description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot featuring a manicured lawn, several trees, and a paved driveway. The building has a flat roof and a geometric layout, with multiple rooms visible from above, separated by interior walls. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored walls and darker roof sections, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a central pathway leading to the main entrance, while the backyard is more open and bordered by a wooden fence. The driveway curves from the street to a parking area adjacent to the house, and the property is surrounded by greenery for privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards, set within a fenced rectangular plot with a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and symmetrical arrangement of trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, long rectangular layout, and the driveway curving along the side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade of the bungalow with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance from the street, more trees, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
